pi_items.verified_value: E11.22 (Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic chronic kidney disease) and N18.3 (Chronic kidney disease, stage 3) are correct
pi_items.source: ICD-10-CM official coding databases (icd10data.com, AAPC, Unbound Medicine) confirm E11.22 as billable code for T2DM with CKD, and N18.3 as parent code for stage 3 CKD

pi_items.verified_value: E11.22 is only code for T2DM with CKD (verified). For CKD stage 3, only N18.30, N18.31, and N18.32 are valid. N18.39 is NOT a valid ICD-10-CM code.
pi_items.source: ICD-10-CM 2026 official sources confirm only three stage 3 subcodes: N18.30 (unspecified), N18.31 (stage 3a), N18.32 (stage 3b). No N18.39 exists in ICD-10-CM.

pi_items.verified_value: I21.02 is correct code for ST elevation (STEMI) myocardial infarction involving left anterior descending coronary artery
pi_items.source: ICD-10-CM official coding databases confirm I21.02 as billable code. Note: Full code for initial encounter would technically be I21.02A (7th character A), but task simplifies to I21.02.

pi_items.verified_value: F33.1 is correct code for Major depressive disorder, recurrent, moderate
pi_items.source: ICD-10-CM official coding databases (icd10data.com, AAPC, Unbound Medicine) confirm F33.1 as billable code for recurrent moderate major depressive disorder

pi_items.verified_value: M16.11 is correct code for Unilateral primary osteoarthritis, right hip
pi_items.source: ICD-10-CM official coding databases confirm M16.11 as billable code for primary osteoarthritis of the right hip

pi_items.verified_value: J13 is correct code for Pneumonia due to Streptococcus pneumoniae
pi_items.source: ICD-10-CM official coding databases confirm J13 as billable code for pneumococcal pneumonia

privileged_info_summary: All five ICD-10-CM codes have been verified against authoritative sources (ICD-10-CM 2026, CMS, AAPC). Five of six metadata claims are correct: E11.22, N18.3, I21.02, F33.1, M16.11, and J13 all correctly represent the specified clinical scenarios. However, one claim is contradicted: the alternatives list for scenario 1 includes 'N18.39' as a valid ICD-10-CM code for CKD stage 3, but this code does not exist. Valid stage 3 CKD codes are only N18.30, N18.31, and N18.32.
